THE ARBITRATOR DID NOT REWRITE THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT AND THE AWARD IS SUPPORTED BY A RATIONAL INTERPRETATION OF SECTION 14.4 OF THE AGREEMENT. OTTO'S PETITION TO CORRECT THE AWARD IS DENIED IN PART AND GRANTED IN PART AS FOLLOWS: THE AWARD TO SCHILLING OF THE ARBITRATION FORUM COSTS AND THE COSTS OF THE ARBITRATOR IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $69,247.82 IS DELETED FROM THE AWARD. Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Or Correct The Arbitrator'S Final Award
Off Calendar Dec-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RICK SEABOLT & ATTY. JOHN A. LOVEMAN OF DUANE MORRIS LLP, TEL. NO. 957-3212 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. MATTHEW S. COVINGTON OF DLA PIPER LLP, TEL. NO. 615-6006 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER PHILIP OTTO'S PETITION TO VACATE OR CORRECT THE ARBITRATOR'S FINAL AWARD OF ATTORNEY;S FEES AND COSTS TO SCHILLING ROBOTIC INCORPORATED - Motion To Vacate The Arbitrator'S Final Award is Denied. The Arbitrator did not rewrite the parties' agreement and the award is supported by a rational interpretation of section 14.4 of the agreement. OTTO'S PETITION TO CORRECT THE AWARD IS DENIED IN PART AND GRANTED IN PART AS FOLLOWS: THE AWARD TO SCHILLING OF THE ARBITRATION FORUM COSTS AND THE COSTS OF THE ARBITRATOR IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $69,247.82 IS DELETED FROM THE AWARD. THE REST OF THE AWARD AND THE BALANCE OF THE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS AWARDED IS CONFIRMED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Hearing On X-Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RICK SEABOLT & ATTY. JOHN A. LOVEMAN OF DUANE MORRIS LLP, TEL. NO. 957-3212 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. MATTHEW S. COVINGTON OF DLA PIPER LLP, TEL. NO. 615-6006 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; RESPONDENT SCHILLING ROBOTICS, INCORPORATED'S Hearing On Cross-Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment IS Granted EXCEPT THE AWARD TO SCHILLING OF THE ARBITRATION FORUM COSTS AND THE COSTS OF THE ARBITRATOR IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $69,247.82 IS DELETED FROM THE AWARD. THE REST OF THE AWARD AND THE BALANCE OF THE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS AWARDED IS CONFIRMED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Hearing On X-Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Continued To Dec-09-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
